changeSet.author: sergio
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM producto WHERE nombre IN ( 'Smartphone Samsung Galaxy S24','iPhone 15 Pro','Tablet iPad Air', 'Smartwatch Apple Watch Series 9','Camara Sony Alpha A7 IV', 'Impresora HP LaserJet Pro','Disco Duro Externo 2TB', 'SSD NVMe 1TB Samsung 990 Pro','Router WiFi 6 TP-Link AX3000', 'Webcam Logitech StreamCam','Microfono Blue Yeti USB', 'Silla Gamer DXRacer Formula','Memoria RAM 32GB DDR5 Corsair', 'Tarjeta Grafica RTX 4070','Bocina JBL Charge 5', 'Drone DJI Mini 4 Pro','Consola PlayStation 5', 'Cargador Inalambrico Qi 15W','Proyector Epson Home Cinema', 'Hub USB-C 7 en 1' );
